## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up between Sean Linehan (Exec) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) to discuss family updates, showcase fwd.digital's workflow platform, and explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel demonstrated fwd.digital's advanced workflow platform, highlighting its efficiency and scalability compared to AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Sean shared Exec's current challenges with AirOps and their new product development for scenario creation](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in potential collaboration, with Marcel proposing a deal partnership](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)

## Topics

### Personal Updates

  - [Sean and Marcel exchanged updates about their newborns and early parenting experiences](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Sean mentioned having a night nurse, which has been "game-changing" for their sleep schedule](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)

### fwd.digital's Workflow Platform

  - [Designed to address common issues with platforms like AirOps (e.g., complexity, scalability, versioning)](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Uses a code-based approach instead of GUI, leveraging the power of structured workflows](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Features include:](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Opinionated workflow framework for code generation and production at scale](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [Auto-generated documentation](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [API endpoints for all components](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
      - [Temporal runtime layer for parallel processing and retrying](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
      - [Observation tools for error tracking](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Exec's Product Development

  - [Sean showcased a new product extension for role-play scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Current workflow uses AirOps for simple tasks but faces limitations for more complex, database-backed operations](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [New version in development includes:](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
      - [Non-voice based input with document upload capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
      - [Generation of multiple scenario directions](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
      - [Structured evaluation criteria](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [Character generation based on provided context](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)

### Collaboration Potential

  - [Marcel proposed a deal partnership, offering fwd.digital's platform to accelerate Exec's development](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Sean expressed interest but raised concerns about:](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
      - [Production reliability and potential pivot risks](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
      - [Backend compatibility (Exec uses Python, GraphQL)](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [Database interfacing requirements](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to regroup with Daniel (colleague) to discuss potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [Marcel to follow up with Sean early next week to continue the conversation](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [Both parties to consider how fwd.digital's platform could integrate with Exec's existing systems and requirements](https://fathom.video/share/JnN9aN2DRevzFohDyxS6P7JsgLx4MPq7?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
